title: Section-Specific Structural Zoning in the Voynich Manuscript: Global versus Section-Conditioned Models of Token Formation
description: Reproduction package for a section-specific structural zoning analysis of the Voynich Manuscript. The package supports analyses of conventional visual/codicological section variation in token profiles, PCS dependency, global versus section-specific models, cross-section transfer, inventory/order decomposition, classification, change-points, unknown-folio proximity, and robustness checks.
notes: DOI for this package is pending Zenodo deposition. This package supports a section-specific extension of the global multi-level framework presented in Chang 2026f.
